The '''Katraasii Droid Ballet Studio''' was located in the [[Katraasii Spaceport]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Katraasii]].

==History==
This building was located in the [[Katraasii Spaceport|spaceport]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Katraasii]]. Catering solely to [[Droid/Legends|droids]], the studio's doors remained locked to [[Species/Legends|organics]], opening only at the approach of a member droid. It also had a second story, with a fair view of the streets outside.

In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] visited the studio, and glimpsed several [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol]] and [[GNK power droid/Legends|GNK]] droids executing a well-timed, tightly choreographed dance.

==Behind the scenes==
This building appears in the game ''Mysteries of the Sith''. It is only enterable if the player takes the time to follow a particularly slow-moving droid through the streets of Katraasii. Reaching the room will not affect or advance the scenario, but it does contain some very large health and [[Personal energy shield/Legends|shield]] replenishes, as well as a small ammo deposit.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' {{1st}}
